descriptions.long: Fast: Install and run any JS tool quickly and seamlessly! Volta is built in Rust and ships as a snappy static binary. Reliable: Ensure everyone in your project has the same tools—without interfering with their workflow. Universal: No matter the package manager, Node runtime, or OS, one command is all you need: volta install.

package.name: volta
package.author: homebrew/core
package.description: JavaScript toolchain manager for reproducible environments

descriptions.short: JavaScript toolchain manager for reproducible environments
descriptions.long: JavaScript toolchain manager for reproducible environments

package.name: Volta
package.author: ScoopInstaller/Main
package.description: Volta is a hassle-free way to manage your JavaScript command-line tools

descriptions.short: Volta is a hassle-free way to manage your JavaScript command-line tools
descriptions.long: Volta is a hassle-free way to manage your JavaScript command-line tools

Fast: Install and run any JS tool quickly and seamlessly! Volta is built in Rust and ships as a snappy static binary. Reliable: Ensure everyone in your project has the same tools—without interfering with their workflow. Universal: No matter the package manager, Node runtime, or OS, one command is all you need: volta install.
